_comment: Tunable Mastercard-capture settings read by the browser extension each run (GET http://localhost:8777/mc-config). Edit to change tracked currencies or timing WITHOUT reloading the extension — takes effect next daily run. FRESH-SESSION model (v1.8.0): capture groupSize currencies, then reload the page for a fresh Akamai cookie, repeat. currencies must be within Krungthai's 20. Times in ms. With 20 currencies and groupSize 5 = 4 groups (~3 reloads) on a clean day; maxReloads allows retry sessions for any blocked ones.
